stemHtml: What does VREF stand for? It is the speed in a specified…

options.a: Take-off configuration, at the point where the aeroplane climbs through 50 ft over the departure runway end, and is used to determine the take-off distance.
options.b: Take-off configuration, at the point where the aeroplane climbs through 35 ft over the departure runway end, and is used to determine the take-off distance.
options.c: Landing configuration, at the point where the aeroplane touches down on the runway, and is used to determine the landing distance for manual landings.
options.d: Landing configuration, at the point where the aeroplane descends through 50 ft, and is used to determine the landing distance for manual landings.
